## Summary
- Harden review-gate approval input with strict canonical layer decision validation.
- Enforce phase_2 -> phase_3 handoff guard before queue transition.
- Add runtime writer for `revision_opportunity_ledger_v1` built from evaluation artifacts.
- Switch revise queue ingestion to consume-only ledger path (no manuscript re-diagnosis).
- Ensure TrustedPath hydrates ledger-backed findings before apply.

## Scope

Pass selection (CHECK EXACTLY ONE — Pass 2 pre-checked as default):

- [ ] Pass 1
- [x] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

Changed files:

- `lib/evaluation/reviewGate/layerDecisionValidation.ts`
- `app/api/jobs/[jobId]/review-gate/route.ts`
- `lib/evaluation/review-gate/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.ts`
- `tests/components/ReviseQueueV2Client.smoke.test.tsx`
- `tests/evaluation/benchmarks/story-ledger-gold-fixtures.spec.ts`
- `.github/pr-bodies/PR-842.md`

Out of scope:

- UI/runtime path expansion beyond the ledger-backed fallback behavior.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)
Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies
- PR is intentionally non-green until live CI, governance CI, latency enforcement, Vercel, and the stress harness clear.
- Branch chain has now been reconciled against `main`; the PR should remain aligned with that chain to avoid duplicate ledger writers or competing workbench paths.
- No hidden runtime expansion is introduced; the new path stays ledger-backed and consume-only.

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration
Process Change: yes

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only inside safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on `accepted_story_ledger_v1` (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on `pass12_handoff_v1` and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after `evaluation_result_v2`) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

Process-Change Impact Summary (required when Process Change: yes):
- Review-gate input is normalized at the server boundary to canonical ledger statuses.
- Phase 3 queueing hard-fails without `pass12_handoff_v1`.
- Revise consumes `revision_opportunity_ledger_v1` instead of re-diagnosing the manuscript.
- TrustedPath hydrates ledger-backed findings before apply and does not create a new runtime path.

## Contract Integrity
- `accepted_story_ledger_v1` remains the governing artifact for Phase 2.
- `pass12_handoff_v1` is required before Phase 3 queueing.
- Revise and TrustedPath consume `revision_opportunity_ledger_v1` as the source of truth.
- Workbench refresh/persist remains a non-blocking fallback only.

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence.

- Validation failures are explicit and fail closed.
- Scope classification uses typed prefixes only, not substring sniffing.
- Canonical layer decision vocabulary is normalized before persistence.
- No silent fallback to manuscript re-diagnosis is allowed in the revise path.
